chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-7916 / 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 12.02.2026. None present for Petitioner. M/s. Ghulam Akbar Lashari & Gul Afshan, Advocates for Respondent (SBCA). ___________________ None present on behalf of the Petitioner. This Petition was instituted in the year 2017 and was fixed in Court on 22.11.2017. Since then no serious efforts were made to get the matter fixed. Question of maintainability was also framed. Today also no one appears on behalf of the Petitioner. It appears that the Petitioner has lost interest to pursue this Petition. Petition is dismissed for non prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
